title: Alerts Not Firing After Updating AWS Credentials
content: If CloudDash alerts stop firing after AWS integration credentials are updated, first verify that the new IAM role or access key has permission to read CloudWatch metrics and list tagged resources. Required permissions include cloudwatch:GetMetricData, cloudwatch:ListMetrics, tag:GetResources, and sts:GetCallerIdentity. Next, open Integrations > AWS > Connection test and confirm the account status is Healthy. If the connection test fails, re-enter the role ARN or access key and secret. If the connection is healthy but alerts still do not fire, open Alerts > Policies and confirm the policies are enabled, notification channels are active, and the monitored resources still match the policy filters. Finally, wait one full evaluation window after credential repair before testing again because CloudDash evaluates alerts after fresh metric ingestion.
